title: POLE TEST PROTOCOL
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"8kjmd","text":"Detailed records should be kept on every experiment, noting date, timing, subject test order, procedural details followed and any relevant observations pertaining to the assay (e.g. specific behavior or procedural errors).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":222}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place animal on horizontal pole facing the top.
Place pole upright with mouse facing upward.
Record the time to turn (orient facing down), and time to reach the bottom of the pole.
All animals tested for 3 trials with a minimum of 00:20:00 between trials.
creator: Jane Balster
